summary: In the aftermath of Russia’s invasion of Ukraine, the Hollywood studios announced the withdrawal of their films from Russian theaters.

headline: Tesla Q2 Deliveries Hit By China Lockdowns, Yet June Production Highest On Record: Worst May Be Behind
summary: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) reported second-quarter deliveries that declined sequentially, in line with expectations, as COVID lockdowns in China impacted performance.

Do You Know Your Canadian Stock Market History?
summary: On Friday, Canada celebrated its national day, in honor of Confederation, which took place on July 1, 1867. The date is a statutory holiday and the Canadian stock market was closed.

headline: Oil And Energy Leads Way: These Were The Top 10 S&P 500 Stocks In First Half Of 2022
summary: The S&P 500 closed the month of June posting the worst half of a year since 1970 and the worst quarter since the first quarter of 2020, a period that included the official declaration of COVID-19 being a pandemic.

headline: Tesla AI Job Cuts, Nio Stung By Short Report, Ford's F-150 Lightning Recall, Faraday Future The New Meme Stock In Town: Week's Top News From EV Industry
summary: Electric vehicle stocks declined in the week ending July 1, taking cues from the retreat in the broader market. The S&P 500 Index fell in the first four sessions of the week amid economic worries, before coming back up in the final trading session, and yet ended the week lower. Company-specific news also hurt sentiment toward some stocks.

headline: Disney Charges $5,000 For Star Wars-Inspired Cocktail: What You Need To Know
summary: It is impossible not to notice that the current inflationary climate has jacked up the prices of nearly everything – but who is willing to pay $5,000 for a cocktail? The Walt Disney Co. (NYSE: DIS) is betting someone with an XL-sized wallet is willing to belly up to the bar for that concoction.

headline: He's Back! Elon Musk Returns To Twitter After Disappearing For 10 Days: He's Tweeting About Pope Francis And More
summary: "Feeling … perhaps … a little bored?" This was one of a series of tweets Elon Musk  put out after his  10-day sabbatical from Twitter.
